title: 🔱 Zarus the Abomination 🔱 [UPDATED 2025]
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/QlJGWH5)

# **Zarus Offlane Abomination**
Build in testing...

---

### Skill-Order
R > RMB > Q > E (Ult > Poke > Stun > Dash)

---

### Base-Build
##### Core Items (still viable for v1.4.5!)
- Augmentation 
- Berserker's Axe

##### Optional Items
- Penumbra
- Mistmeadow Buckler
- Fist of Razuul
- The Perforator

---

### Crest
- Iceskorn Talons is the way to go, since it fits Zarus' playstyle so well
- Judgement as alternative, if you want crazy fast waveclear in mid-late game

---

### Alternative Items
- Match-Up dependent
- Combinable

##### Alternatives vs. Selfhealing Heroes
- Good vs. Khaimera, Seraph and other strong on-hit-lifesteal heroes
- Tainted Blade
 - reduces heal on dealing phy dmg
 - amplifies dmg
 - grants good phy. power and health (less tanky option)
- Tainted Guard
 - also reduces heal, but on being hit by basic attacks (more tanky option)
 - applies bleed for passive dmg
- situational pick, i'd prefer Tainted Blade

##### Alternatives vs. Tanky / High-HP Heroes
- tba

##### Alternatives vs. ADC / High-Burst Physical Heroes
- Salvation
 - pops a shield when below 40% health
- Stonewall
 - when high phy. defense + dmg-mitigation is needed
- Frostguard
 - good phy. and mag. defense
 - helps reducing enemies atk. speed
 - lacks additional health

##### Alternatives vs. Midlaners / Strong Magical Heroes
- tba

---

### (some) Synergies & more
- engaging with Coliseum triggers Augmentation and Berserker's Axe (juicy)
- use Iceskorn Talons to fully utilize Coliseum
- try to get those Gladiator stacks fast while you're in Coliseum or build them up before
 - Gladiator effect is doubled => not +8% but **+16% phy. power increase**
- don't forget that Coliseum generates 5/8/11 permanent phy. power on a takedown of the targeted enemy hero, so **scale as much as possible** (v1.4.5 patch)

###### CD reduction
- 95 ability haste in total = ~45% CD reduction

---

### Notes
Just make sure you bring enough dmg-items, you **dont** want to go full tanky in most scenarios. Especially because other heroes are better tanks than Zarus.
author: christoph.miller1

title: The Kastelan Robot
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/83jZSFn)

**HOWITZER** 
---
*Allora, parto dicendo che: secondo me questa build funziona molto bene e non ha bisogno di cambiamenti o alternative. Io le ho inserite giusto per i pignoli che trovano Howitzer con full velocità d'attacco una roba oscena (ma anche perché a volte conviene avere uno scudo in piu che in meno :) ). Invece secondo me è veramente forte. Vero, renderà meno contro un avversario che pusha o mele, ma se giocate chill e con calma spaccherete tutto. Vi dico già che più di una partita mi capitava di ricevere insulti per questa build ma fidatevi non me potrete fare più a meno! Provare per credere!*

*(Piccolo suggerimento: tenetevi una mina di prossimità per quando fate i River buff Cosi da tornare saltando in lane!)*

-Well, I'll start by saying that: in my opinion this build works very well and does not need any changes or alternatives. I've included them just for the picky ones who find Howitzer with full attack speed is obscene (but also because sometimes it's better to have one more shield than one less :) ). Instead, in my opinion, it's really strong.True, it will be less effective against an opponent who pushes or melee's heros, but if you play chill and calmly you will destroy everything. I already tell you that more than one game I happened to receive insults for this build but trust me You won't be able to do without it! Try it and believe it!

(Little tip: keep a proximity mine for when you do River buffs so you can jump back into lane!)

title: 🔥SPICY🔥LANE WINNER, THE FEY!!!
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/fk9MiSQ)

**Build:**
---
*Soulbearer:* This Crest provides healing potential, perfect for aiding in sustain and survivability in team fights. It aligns well with The Fey's playstyle of poking enemies while staying back to provide support.

*Tainted Scepter:* This item provides consistent magical damage over time while also applying anti-healing, reducing enemy healing effects. It's a great counter against teams with heavy sustain.

*Megacosm:* This item increases your damage output with a powerful damage-over-time effect, synergizing well with The Fey's abilities that continuously damage enemies.

*Wraith Leggings:* This item grants you crucial mobility and magical penetration. It helps you reposition and kite effectively, while also shredding enemy resistances.

*Oblivion Crown:* The crown jewel for burst damage, amplifying your magical power significantly and enhancing your ability to burst down enemies quickly.

**Abilities:**
---
>**Bramble Patch (Q):** Lay down a series of thorny vines that slow and damage enemies. Use this to zone out enemies or set traps for unsuspecting foes.
**Harvest Nettles (E):** A spam-able projectile that deals damage to a single target and refunds mana if it hits, perfect for consistent poke damage and mana sustain.
**Untamed Growth (RMB):** Toss an explosive plant that deals damage in an area after a delay. This is excellent for harassing enemies or clearing waves quickly.
**Fly Trap (Ultimate - R):** Summon a massive fly trap that pulls in and damages enemies in its area. This is your game-changing ability, perfect for turning the tide of team fights by grouping enemies together.

**Priories: RMB > E > Q**
**Against close range heroes: E > Q > RMB**
**For poke: E > RMB > Q**
**For close range and poke: E > Q > RMB**

**Guide through gameplay:**
---
***Early Game***

Focus on farming safely and using Harvest Nettles to poke enemies while keeping your mana sustained. Use Untamed Growth to clear waves and zone enemies away from objectives.
Place Bramble Patch strategically in chokepoints or around jungle entrances to deter enemy ganks and provide vision control.
Keep an eye on your health and be conservative with engagements, relying on your Soulbearer Crest for extra healing when necessary.

***Mid Game***

Roam and assist your team in securing objectives, as your abilities can deal significant area damage and control. Use Fly Trap to initiate or turn fights, focusing on pulling in high-priority targets.
Make sure to ward crucial areas and continue applying pressure with your poke damage, always staying near teammates for protection.

***End Game***

Your job is to play around objectives and look for opportunities to land a devastating Fly Trap on the enemy backline. Your items amplify your burst and area control, making you a huge threat if left unchecked.
Stay on the outskirts of fights, dealing damage and controlling space with Bramble Patch and Untamed Growth. Use Wraith Leggings to reposition if you’re in danger.
Prioritize dealing damage from a safe distance and using your ultimate to disrupt enemy formations.

**Final thoughts:**
---
This build maximizes The Fey's ability to control and dish out consistent damage in fights. With items like Tainted Scepter and Megacosm, you excel at wearing down enemies over time, while Oblivion Crown allows for high-impact bursts. Positioning and timing are key, as you are both a potent damage dealer and a controller who can turn fights in your team’s favor. Remember to always keep an eye on enemy threats and use your mobility to avoid getting caught.

***BECOME A GOOD RANDOM WITH MY TIPS AND PLEASE LIKE THIS BUILD IF IT MEANS YOU ANYTHING :)***
---
author: Klokanche

title: Phase Support Build [v0.18]
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/0Glb9pR)

# Core
FIRST we add ***"Crystal Tear"*** with very good base stats and a passive ability that works great on Phase and boosts healing again. Second we build ***"Galaxy Greaves"***  to have more mobility on the map depending on the situation, also with "Telekinetic Link" and Movement Speed

- **Crystasl Tear**
- **Galaxy Greaves**

> **-------------------------------------** 
If I'm playing with a carry that relies on attack speed or builds more towards attack speed, then I build **"Marshall"** earlier like after **"Crystal Tear"**. You either have to do the carry according to whether he needs or wants the extra attack speed or you look at what kind of build the carry builds, early items etc.
**-------------------------------------**

- *Marshall*

__________________________________

## Mid/Lategame Items 

We can build ***"Lunaria"*** to have a little more heal/ability haste.
As a flex item, we are building  ***"Tainted Scepter"*** for an antiheal passive, which can be activated very easily via the "Energy Lance". This item also has 20 ability Haste on it, which is very good for us. We can also build ***"Windcaller"*** for a little more mobility and a little more heal power. For Damage Mitigation and more heal power we also can build ***"Everbloom"*** or for litte more Damage and very good Ability Haste we can build ***"Crescelia"*** 

- **Lunaria**
- *Tainted Scepter*
- **Windcaller**
- **Everbloom**
- *Crescelia*

__________________________________

## Situational Items 
As a next flex item you build  ***"Dynamo"*** because the root can activate the passive quite quickly. We also have good physical armor on it and have more sustain.
Depending on the situation, we can now build "Stonewall" against Physical Dmg on you or we can build ***"Timewarp"*** for more Ability Haste and Magical Power or we can build "Vanguardian" to have more Defence for you and your teammates. 
​
- *Dynamo*
- *Stonewall*
- *Timewarp*
- *Vanguardian*

__________________________________

# Crest

We can play ***"Tranquility"*** to heal every 30 seconds scalling with our Magical Power

- **Tranquility**

__________________________________

##### other Crest Situational

Situational as Crest ***"Silentium"*** to cancel many abilities like  Gideon Ult or Countess Ult on the carry or enemy Phase Ult. We can play ***"Reclamation"*** to cleanse you and your Teammates from CC. We can also build ***"Santification"*** to have an additional shield for our mates or we can build ***"Lifesong"*** to have more mobility for us and our mates

- *Silentium*
- *Reclamation*
- *Santification*

__________________________________

title: Belica Support Build [v0.18]
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/SfG7GS2)

# Core Items

First we build ***"Timewarp"***. With Time Warp we have even more ability haste and even more magical power. After Dynamo we build ***"Tainted Scepter"*** for very good Antiheal and more Magical Power. We also scale great with the passive of the item


- **Timewarp**
- **Tainted Scepter**

> **-------------------------------------** 
If I'm playing with a carry that relies on attack speed or builds more towards attack speed, then I build **"Marshall"** earlier like after **"Crystal Tear"**. You either have to do the carry according to whether he needs or wants the extra attack speed or you look at what kind of build the carry builds, early items etc.
**-------------------------------------**

- *Marshall*

___________________________________

## Midgame Items (Flex)

We can build ***"Spellbreaker"*** to have a little more sustain against certain enemy abilities. ***"Dynamo"*** which has a super passive that we can activate with our stun and our ultimate. Also very good base stats. We can build ***"Galaxy Greaves"***  to have more mobility on the map depending on the situation. We can build situational ***"Wraith Leggings"*** to have some movement speed after an ability hit on the enemy hero and we have bonus magical damage. We also can build ***"Crescelia"*** for very good Ability colldowns and little more Damage.

- **Spellbreaker**
- **Galaxy Greaves**
- **Crescelia**
- *Dynamo*
- *Wraith Leggings*


__________________________________


## Situational Items 
We can build ***"Vanguardian"*** to have more sustain for ourselves and our teammates. We can build ***"Golems Gift"***  to have a little more physical armor and also magical power or we can build ***"Megacosm"*** to get the maximum dmg out of the late game.

- ***Megacosm***
- *Golems Gift*
- *Vanguardian*

__________________________________


# Crest

***"Silentium"*** to cancel many abilities like  Gideon Ult or Countess Ult on the carry or enemy Phase Ult.

- **Silentium**

__________________________________

##### other Crest Situational

Situational as Crest  ***"Reclamation"*** to cleanse you and your Teammates from CC. We can also build ***"Santification"*** to have an additional shield for our mates or  We can play ***"Tranquility"*** to heal every 30 seconds scalling with our Magical Power



- *Tranquility*
- *Reclamation*
- *Santification*

__________________________________
